view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the quiet hours scenario, but the evidence does not provide specific results or outcomes from the simulation. While the linked use case outlines the expected behavior regarding quiet hours, there is no concrete evidence that the scenario was executed or that the expected results were confirmed or reported. This lack of execution evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the persona scenario.
